content:
# Severance Packages

If your employment or contract with 37signals is terminated, you may be eligible for a severance package. In most cases, if you've been with the company for [DATE_TIME], you'll be offered a lump sum payment equivalent to [DATE_TIME] pay. If you've been with the company for [DATE_TIME], you'll be offered [DATE_TIME] pay for [DATE_TIME] of employment, with a maximum of [DATE_TIME] of severance pay.

The package will also include health insurance for you and your dependents if you’ve been on our policies for the same time periods, compensation for unused vacation time, and compensation for unused sabbatical time if applicable ([DATE_TIME] look back).

Compensation for unused PTO is calculated using your [DATE_TIME] rate. In return, you’ll be asked for a general release of liabilities and other standard employment termination terms. If you're terminated for cause; such as misconduct, violation of company policies, insubordination or substance abuse while working, you will not be eligible for severance unless otherwise determined by management.
